title: About — Tu, Wei-Hua
name: Tu, Wei-Hua
bio: Anthropologist-turned strategist focused on audience infrastructure, behavioral systems, and data monetization. Experienced in translating complex business and user behavior into scalable operational and cross-functional frameworks across media and digital platforms.

awards.description: Tiptoe (踮腳尖), nominated for K-Plus Children's Short Film Competition, 69th Berlin International Film Festival
Small Talk (日常對話), Teddy Award, 67th Berlin International Film Festival; Taiwan's submission for Best Foreign Language Film, 90th Academy Awards
